name: Frayed Chain
catchPrompt: A worn, fraying chain — the weakest binding tool a tamer carries. It can only hold a monster that is already badly weakened, exhausted, or near death; a healthy, energetic, or fierce monster snaps it with ease.

name: Iron Chain
catchPrompt: A solid iron chain. It can hold a moderately weakened monster, but a strong, healthy, or unusually powerful monster tends to break free of it.

name: Steel Chain
catchPrompt: A tempered steel chain. Reliable against most weakened monsters and able to hold fairly strong ones, though the mightiest still resist it when not worn down.

name: Runed Chain
catchPrompt: A rune-etched chain humming with binding magic. It can capture even strong or formidable monsters once they are somewhat weakened, and rarely fails on a faltering one.

name: Astral Chain
catchPrompt: A radiant astral chain of immense binding power. It can hold nearly any monster, even the most powerful, unless that monster is still at close to full strength.

name: Eternal Coil
catchPrompt: An ever-coiling chain that never runs dry. Strong and relentless — it binds most monsters that are even modestly weakened, wearing them down with persistence rather than raw force.

name: Sovereign Bind
catchPrompt: A legendary binding of absolute authority. Once the target monster is meaningfully weakened — below roughly half health, or suffering a status effect — the capture is all but guaranteed. Only a near-full-strength monster retains any real chance to escape it.

name: Hydra Lash
catchPrompt: A many-headed lashing chain that strikes from every angle at once. Powerful and aggressive — it readily binds weakened or even moderately strong monsters, overwhelming their resistance.
